cross_scene_arcs.title: From Setback to Obligation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After a failed theft ruins the painting, Daniel is forced by Bastaldi to undertake a new heist in Chicago.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Assigned to rob the Taylors under duress, must leave the next day.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The fate of Bastaldi's prisoner and the challenges of the new heist.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Navigating Peril and Taking Charge
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Daniel discovers they robbed a Mafia underboss, asserts leadership to focus on finding Sophie, orders escapes after threats, and acquires weapons while being targeted.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: In Zammito's bedroom, aware of robbing a Mafia underboss.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Has acquired weapons but is confirmed as a target with an active bounty.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to deal with Zammito's bounty and escape safely.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Uncovering Conspiracy and Seeking Leverage
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Daniel confirms the heist was an FBI setup, decides to keep incriminating tapes as leverage against Bastaldi, and negotiates with Bonanno for safe passage.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aware that the heist was orchestrated by the FBI.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tentative agreement with Bonanno to exchange half the tapes for safe passage.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Bonanno will honor the deal and how to effectively use the tapes.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Honoring Julien with Vengeance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Daniel confirms Julien's death and later activates a device in his honor, committing an act of vengeance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aware of Julien's death, group somber.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Device activated with the statement 'This is for Julien.'
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The consequence of activating the device is unknown.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Coercive Enforcement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marcel uses physical violence to coerce individuals, first forcing Sami to accept a job and later assaulting a biker, demonstrating a pattern of aggressive enforcement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Initiates coercion against Sami for the Chicago job.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Engages in unprovoked assault on a biker.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether his violent tendencies will lead to further escalation or retaliation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Allegiance to Bastaldi
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marcel maintains loyalty to Bastaldi by accepting assignments, following orders during the heist escape, and defending Bastaldi's authority, which isolates him from the crew.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Assigned by Bastaldi to accompany Daniel to the airport.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Clashes with crew members over loyalty to Bastaldi during escape debates.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The rift between his allegiance to Bastaldi and the crew's concerns remains unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deteriorating Crew Relations
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marcel's actions, such as taking a baseball and failing to verify counterfeit money, lead to growing suspicion, blame, and open conflict with the crew, culminating in the loss of a valuable painting.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Raises Daniel's suspicion by claiming the alias 'Elvis' and taking a baseball.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Faces group blame and conflict after the painting is lost due to his insistence on the baseball.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The group's anger and damaged trust are not repaired, leaving Marcel in a precarious position within the crew.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Coerced into Crime and Marcel's Threats
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sami is forced by Marcel to join a heist crew under threat, later argues to take the stolen money and flee, and ends up in a direct physical conflict with Marcel over a baseball.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Obligated to report for a criminal job in Chicago under life-threatening warning.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Loses items in a confrontation with Marcel, adversarial relationship intensified.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing adversarial relationship with Marcel remains unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Trust and Betrayal with Sophie
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sami reveals his prison past and personal betrayal to Sophie, later discovers she stole the heist loot, and confirms her betrayal was motivated by money.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sharing personal history with Sophie, building rapport.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Trust completely broken upon learning of Sophie's deceit for financial gain.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: None, as betrayal is fully exposed and confirmed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: FBI Conspiracy and Mafia Threat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sami realizes the crew robbed a Chicago Mafia underboss, uncovers an FBI setup to frame them, insists on staying in Chicago to resolve the situation, and exposes the corrupt FBI agent with video evidence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aware of a life-threatening error involving the mafia.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Takes control by secretly recording and distributing incriminating evidence to law enforcement.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Potential retaliation from Zammito or the FBI, though evidence has been sent.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Eroding Trust with Zero
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sami learns Zero hid a gun in his bag during customs, compromising trust, and later deceives Zero by swapping bags and leaving with the original tapes.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Unwitting smuggler, trust compromised after discovering the gun incident.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Actively deceives Zero by leaving with a decoy bag, further damaging their relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Zero will notice the deception and react upon discovery.
